title: Audio
description: A single audio file. Used in search results.

id.description: Our unique identifier for an open-licensed work.

indexed_on.description: The timestamp of when the media was indexed by Openverse.

foreign_landing_url.description: The landing page of the work.

url.description: The actual URL to the media file.

creator.description: The name of the media creator.

creator_url.description: A direct link to the media creator.

license.description: The name of license for the media.

license_version.description: The version of the media license.

license_url.description: A direct link to the license deed or legal terms.

provider.description: The content provider, e.g. Flickr, Jamendo...

source.description: The source of the data, meaning a particular dataset. Source and provider can be different. Eg: the Google Open Images dataset is source=openimages, but provider=flickr.

category.description: The top-level classification of this media file.

genres.description: An array of audio genres such as `rock`, `electronic` for `music` category, or `politics`, `sport`, `education` for `podcast` category

filetype.description: The type of the file, related to the file extension.

tags.description: Tags with detailed metadata, such as accuracy.

alt_files.description: JSON describing alternative files for this audio.

attribution.description: Legally valid attribution for the media item in plain-text English.

fields_matched.description: List the fields that matched the query for this result.

mature.description: Whether the media item is marked as mature

audio_set.description: Reference to set of which this track is a part.

duration.description: The time length of the audio file in milliseconds.

bit_rate.description: Number in bits per second, eg. 128000.

thumbnail.description: A direct link to the miniature artwork.

detail_url.description: A direct link to the detail view of this audio file.

related_url.description: A link to an endpoint that provides similar audio files.

waveform.description: A direct link to the waveform peaks.
